blocker: True production validation (live shadow-mode run, off-distribution trap-recall, real MTTR delta) blocked by absence of a live SRE integration + real incident stream; producing prod numbers would require fabrication, which the task forbids
one_line: Wrote an HONEST 'lessons from (pre-)production' deployment-readiness section grounded in real findings (D13 gameable reward/hedge 92.9%, A16 54/61 sim-validated fixes + 7 broken, A9 12/30 unknown MTTR); frames 3 gaps (trap-safety under distribution shift, shadow-mode, MTTR) with validation protocols + NOT-YET-MEASURED acceptance gates; ships a machine-checkable readiness_gaps.json + validator that bans fabricated-prod phrasing (caught my own draft) + 7 passing pytest; no core edits
